request_last_error_message: Queued job superseded before execution: image172647_c01 had already failed in-run pODMR TrackCenter/count gate and immediate standalone retrack, project state moved to fresh re-image candidate reimage1804_c01, and a separate reimage1804_c01 pODMR is currently running. Preventing unintended stale c01 execute from an interrupted old single-submit batch.
decision_reason: The request targets the obsolete image172647_c01 strong-pi pODMR batch. c01 had repeated low-count TrackCenter/alignment failures before data, the project already moved to fresh re-image candidates, reimage1804_c02 has a terminal usable pODMR resonance and is now in the Ramsey/T2star branch. Retrying stale c01 would be obsolete and bridge-touching work is occupied by the current Ramsey job.
single_submit_control_stop_reason: superseded stale image172647_c01 single-submit after low-count failures and fresh reimage1804_c01 pODMR running; do not retry old c01
